appraisal_events.evidence: « elle se montrait tout de même insupportable »; « une ironique expression d’orgueil »; « propos … injurieux »; « un atavisme de rapacité et de vulgarité provinciales »
appraisal_events.explanation: The narrator portrays Françoise as proud, obstructive, and vulgar when he prepares to meet his friends, explicitly lowering her standing in his eyes.

status_effects.explanation: Locally, Françoise is framed as prideful and vexatious, lowering her evaluation in the narrator’s account.
